name: Alkurai
short_description: Alkurai is a 4 player online co-op fantasy horror game. An infamous Alchemist has murdered the king and seized Alkurai's throne. It is up to you and your party to evade his horrid miscreations and restore the kingdom to what it once was.
detailed_description:
Overview

Alkurai is an immersive co-op Fantasy Horror game for 1-4 players. The kingdom of Alkurai has been seized by the now infamous Alchemist. His true intentions are unknown, but his "miscreations" have resulted in the loss of countless lives. A job listing has been put up across the world with a generous reward. You and your party must rise to the occasion and save the kingdom of Alkurai.

Chapters

  • Alkurai's Royal Garden
    Alkurai's Dungeon
    The Castle

    Key Gameplay

    • 1-4 Players
    • Intricate Puzzle Progression
    • Maze/Dungeon style maps
    • Linear Game Progression

      Unique Features

      • An inspired Dark Fantasy Horror Game
      • Original Story and Lore
      • Drinking Mechanic
      • Sanity Bar

      Early Access

      This is a new game, bugs are mostly out of the game but with your help and submitting them in our discord we will be able to see them and work on them, thank you and the community
